name: Saffron Rice Royale
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup uncooked extra long grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat until crisp and brown. Remove bacon to an absorbent paper towel, set aside.
2. Add onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender.
3. Stir in rice, peas, broth, sherry, and saffron or turmeric into the pan.
4. Bring mixture to a boil; stir. Reduce heat and cover.
5. Simmer for 15 minutes or until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.
6. Add crumbled bacon, grated Parmesan cheese, and ground white pepper. Toss.
